name: ArkForge Trust Layer
description: Third-party cryptographic proof for AI agent API calls. Works with Claude, GPT-4, Mistral, LangChain, AutoGen. The proof is signed by ArkForge — not by your agent.

tools.name: certify_call
tools.description: Call an external API and get a cryptographic proof of the transaction (Ed25519 signature, RFC 3161 timestamp, Sigstore Rekor).

tools.name: get_proof
tools.description: Retrieve the full cryptographic proof bundle for a given proof ID.

tools.name: verify_proof
tools.description: Get a human-readable summary of what a proof certifies.

tools.name: get_usage
tools.description: Check your ArkForge API usage and remaining credits for the current period.
